content: هَتُوصَل اِلحَمولَة كَمان عَشرين يَوْم تَقريباً في اِلمِيناَء

transcriptions.arabizi: hatuwsal ilhamoola kamaen Aashreen yoom ta'reeban fiilmeena'

relationships: eng:the cargo will arrive in the port in about twenty days
